title: Roboo's Hypixel Skyblock Modpack
description: A collection of mods for Hypixel Skyblock 1.21.5
body:
## **Roboo's Hypixel Skyblock Modpack**

This modpack is mainly for myself to keep track of my mods & help friends switch to 1.21.5

## **Included Mods:**
<details>
<summary>Skyblock Mods</summary>

- [SkyHanni](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyhanni)  
  A feature-rich mod for Hypixel Skyblock, offering solvers, helpers, and quality-of-life additions like dungeon utilities, garden crop tracking, and chat filters.

- [Skyblock Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-tweaks)  
  Provides tweaks and enhancements for Hypixel Skyblock, focusing on gameplay improvements.

- [SkyBlock Profile Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-profile-viewer)  
  Allows players to view detailed Skyblock profiles, including stats and inventories, directly in-game.

- [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)  
  Enhances Hypixel Skyblock with additional features and optimizations, such as improved UI and gameplay tools.

- [Skyblock21](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock21)  
  A mod tailored for Skyblock, offering utilities and enhancements for the Hypixel Skyblock experience.

- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)  
  Used by Firmament to show item list/recipes (Similar to NEU, highly recommend configuring it to look better).

</details>

<details>
<summary>QOL Mods</summary>

- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)  
  Increases the chat history limit, allowing players to see more past messages in-game.

- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)  
  Disables chat reporting to enhance privacy and prevent unwanted moderation in multiplayer.

- [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer)  
  Adds a customizable zoom function to Minecraft, similar to OptiFine’s zoom, for better visibility.

- [Chat Calc](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatcalc)  
  Enables mathematical calculations directly in the chat, useful for quick computations.

- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes)  
  Adds dynamic, animated capes to player skins for a cosmetic enhancement.

- [No Sneaking Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-sneaking-animation)  
  Removes the sneaking animation for a smoother visual experience. (1.8 Sneak, must configure it)

- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)  
  Enhances visuals by removing block borders, creating a cleaner aesthetic.

- [Compacting](https://modrinth.com/mod/compacting)  
  Compacts chat like patcher on 1.8.

- [Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/mod/fullbright)  
  Enables maximum brightness in dark environments, eliminating the need for torches.

- [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll)  
  Allows scrolling through item tooltips that are too long to fit on the screen.
  
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)  
  Optimizes memory usage for better performance in modded Minecraft.
  
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-options)  
  Enhances Sodium’s settings menu with a more user-friendly interface for configuration.

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)  
  A performance optimization mod that improves rendering and frame rates for Minecraft.

- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)  
  Extends Sodium with additional graphical options like weather effects and particle controls.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Backend/Config Mods</summary>

- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)  
  Provides a framework for dynamic text placeholders, enabling mods to insert custom text in chat or UI.

- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)  
  A configuration library for mods, allowing easy creation of customizable settings menus.
  
- [Your Options Shall Be Respected](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr)  
  Preserves user configuration settings across mod updates to prevent resets.

- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)  
  Enables Kotlin language support for Fabric mods, used by developers for mod creation.

- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)  
  A cross-platform API for mod developers to create mods compatible with multiple loaders.

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)  
  A core library providing essential hooks and tools for Fabric mods to function.

- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)  
  A flexible configuration library for creating intuitive mod settings interfaces.

- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)  
  Adds a mod menu to view and configure installed mods in-game.

</details>

## **Recommended Launchers**
- **Prism Launcher (More support will come with this)**
- Modrinth App


## **Other Info**
**Depending on installation date may need to update mods, this can be done directly in the launcher with a simple button press.**
  
_This modpack is associated with any mod directly and is just a collection of existing mods. Please report any issues/bugs with a mod to their respective GitHub or Discord._
